name: Paimon
description: A djinn of maniacal love and chaos. With the power to control wind, she is contained within Hakuei's Flabellum. (Source: Wikipedia)

description: He is the cardinal of Temple of Vasilios.

She had to flee to earth because she blew up a city and couldn't pay for repairs. Piyoko's dresses similar to that of a nurse's uniform, but in black and white colors like a panda. description: A boy from the present day.

name: Quant Blitz
description: Quant Blitz is a Ranker. He instructed the Scout position while he was a Test Admin on the Second Floor.

name: Rea Himuro
description: Ren's upperclassman. Just as popular as Kasumi. But while Kasumi's popularity can be categorized as more or less conventional, Rea is idolized by those of more peculiar tastes, as - just like Ren - she normally tends to keep her distance from those around her. She exudes an aura of aloofness, her well-ordered features of mixed German and Japanese blood rarely betraying emotion. However, despite that initial impression, she is hardly the type to be cold to others. An "eccentric weirdo" might be a

name: Rebecca Randall
nativeName: レベッカ・ランドール
description: Rebecca is a confident and intelligent young woman, as well as very strong willed. She is easily able to cow most others using her beauty, brains, or force of will, though she seems to prefer the velvet glove when possible. She gets along with everyone around her due to her kind nature, though as the student council president she does discipline students who break school rules, mostly Jessica. She often makes sexual advances towards Ash, claiming that she's interested in him, but mostly does it
searchTerms: レベッカ・ランドール

name: Reiko Mikami
description: Kouichi's aunt from Ritsuko's side ~!and class 3-3 deputy homeroom teacher. She gives her nephew advice on how to make it through Yomiyama through a series of "rules". One of them is to separate the private life from school life, thus Kouichi addresses her as Reiko at home, and Ms. Mikami at school.!~ ~! She is also revealed to be the extra/dead one. Reiko was murdered about an year and a half before the accidents started to happen.!~

name: Romin Kirishima
description: Yuga’s classmate. Along with top-class grades and being super good at sports, she’s the lead guitarist of the elementary school band “RoaRomin.” While she doesn’t really like Duels, she’s a girl wrapped in mystery who often crosses paths with Yuga and his buddies. (Source: YGOrganization)

name: Ryosuke Kaga
description: The main protagonist of the story who lost his perverted spirit to Lisara, and now struggles to regain that spirit back. Ryosuke cannot enjoy himself while living with the Death Goddess Lisara under a contract, because he gave up his erotic spirit under the deal. He cannot get excitement from watching girls and wonders if his adolescent days are over. Also, he learns from Lisara, that he will die in three months and in return of his help, she will try to change his fate. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Ryuhei Sawamura
description: Sawamura is a boxer and counter-punch user who is naturally talented, but likes to cause his opponents pain in the ring, which often disqualifies him.
mediaTitles: Hajime No Ippo: The Fighting! - Rising -
searchTerms: Hajime No Ippo: The Fighting! - Rising -

name: Scopper Gaban
description: __Affiliations__: Roger Pirates __Occupations__: Pirate Scopper was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. ~!Since the crew's disbandment and Roger's execution, Gaban has come to live out his retirement on Elbaph, alongside his partner Ripley and their son Colon, being known to the giant locals as Ya-san.!~ (Source: One Piece Wiki)

name: Seiya Mita
description: Touma´s elder brother.

name: Shinji Kanemaru
description: A first year at Seidou High School and Eijun's classmate. Kanemaru lived in the dorms with Chris as his roommate. A very confident first-year and considered the leader of first years. At first, he disliked Eijun because Kanemaru thought Eijun could only talk big, but he came to acknowledge him as an integral player in the first string.

name: Shinjirou Hayashida
description: Kamiyama's first friend at Cromartie, noted for his (fake) purple mohawk. Hayashida is the one delinquent that helps Kamiyama blend in to the bewildering environment of Cromartie High. Although streetwise, he is dumber than the gorilla and doesn't even understand basic math.

name: Shizuka Masou
description: A powerful magic user who was one of the Four Witches of Kathtom. According to her teacher, Ragishss, Shizuka had the greatest talent of the four and was considered the strongest among his students. With the additional power gained from her ring, she became even stronger than Ragishss, whom she ended up killing during her betrayal. She is very concerned with her father's death. Ever since Rance stopped her from altering the past during the events of the Kathtom Incident, she has been trying to f
mediaTitles: Rance 01: Hikari wo Motomete THE ANIMATION

name: Somali Longhaired
nativeName: ソマリ・ロングヘアード
description: A 1st year student, Somali possesses superhuman strength and has a happy-go-lucky attitude. She was bullied by fellow classmates when she was younger together with Aby. As a result, she also sought to become a prefect and takes orders from Aby, no matter how underhanded they are. She cares deeply for Aby and aims to becoming a woman fit for him. She's not as condescending as most other White Cats members are toward the Black Dogs and seems to be aware of the relationship between Romio and Juliet
searchTerms: ソマリ・ロングヘアード

name: Su-Ho Ahn
description: Stephen Ahn was Gray Yeon's classmate and best friend in Byuksan Middle School. He was a model student and an unfortunate set of incidents lead to him being hospitalized and caused Gray to eventually end up enrolling at Eunjang High School.

name: Subaru Miyamoto

description: A cute and mysterious young girl who lives in a big tree. She is a stand user and often plays with strange dolls.

name: Tetsu  Misato
description: He is a third-year in high school, who begins working part-time under his father's housekeeping agency to save up money due to personal circumstances. He is assigned to work at the Karasawa Estate, where he soon becomes friends with and the personal housekeeper for the daughter of Tetsu's employers, [Shizu](https://anilist.co/character/156990).
